textByHashes.7c2a21ab8256b3cb848f6878eb4e30b24ee4f74c: Oh, I do declare! Another perambulating soul traipses through this verdant forest!
textByHashes.a460d016a62914fed43dac4f630fc2059388df87: Salutations, my good compatriot! Pray, what curious happenstance is it that brings yourself out to my sylvan domicile?
textByHashes.2b69e28b7a4654731452ed2a7e69914ab0012035: The rainforest! A most resplendent deviation from the cacophonous tyranny of urban existence.
textByHashes.8ae50e65108109a5b00719e7aa8a7ccca0f28db4: Indeed! Out here, one may emancipate themselves amidst blissful tranquility.
textByHashes.7c431b27c60789d0a02dea9c2c3be3257415f8ea: Well, it commenced when I was merely a youth, and has proceeded uninterrupted ever since.
textByHashes.785bda39a203e229af8aa216669e682cccfb3dd9: I was most fortuitously deposited within this locale by my progenitors, along with this extravagant bundle of novels. Behold this one!
textByHashes.71d643ae63e461a80101fafcf9c73c4c9a3fb8d8: What an exquisitely scandalous read it was. Now, you seem like someone who appreciates linguistic variety! Would you care to partake in a spot of intellectual cultivation with me?
textByHashes.f0d24d5ff1d991ea1d53232dcd0928d1773cb41c: I possess a cornucopia of literary marvels. This one by Di. C. Tionary is captivating.
textByHashes.ff261611e9fcb4720463efed1cc82f982d1be503: No! Di. C. Tionary. She's one of the foremost novelists of our time. Such an unparalleled way with words. I'd love to have an audience with her some day.
textByHashes.1672ef48c011e548fc891e385650794265701713: Tell me, have you met any of the literary greats?
textByHashes.6aa1a62f969a86891c5486704403f35c54972996: A tragedy, to be unequivocally certain.
textByHashes.ea4dbd716cbd1dfb12677ab378dd85046b978361: Very well! I shan't exasperate you with excessive and superfluous conversation. Besides, my tomes beckon. Farewell.
textByHashes.f1fa04f3eb44d8a4470c11e54982d2c43eaf630a: I have little to say on this object. Congratulations on your ownership of it.
